name: relay
description: Delegate a task to another harness — relay work to the codex, opencode, or claude CLI (delegate / review / image), capture the result, and report back.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate tasks to another harness's CLI (codex / opencode / claude).
interface.longDescription: Relay work to codex, opencode, or claude CLI with delegate, review, and image modes. Supports native and prompt-based strategies across the harness ecosystem.
